_comment: Auto-repair fixture: stage 5 (apply-patch) failure at attempt 2. On attempt N>=2 the driver additionally runs a chain-apply against the prior attempt's bundle before giving up (fix-task.ts stage5ApplyPatch chain-apply branch). The fixture encodes the prior bundle content (what attempt 1 produced) so the chain-apply path has an on-disk artefact to load, and the prior_failure JSON that the REVISE workflow consumed to author the revised bundle. Expected auto-repair loop exit 66 + fresh trp-fail-a2 record.
